title: TruthLayerRules
$comment: Task 2B rule carrier only. AI output must enter ClaimLedgerItem, not canonical Candidate fields directly. Candidate canonical fields must carry verification/status metadata. WorkflowEvent is required for key state transitions. AITaskRun records AI-assisted actions. Raw Candidate must not be exposed to Client-facing contracts. Client-safe DTOs are server-owned and will be implemented later. Consent/disclosure behavior is not implemented in Task 2B.
